query: Tool-Augmented Credit Optimization for Agentic Tool Use review

results.title: Kilo Code Reviews (2026) | Product Hunt
results.content:
I've been working with agents since before they were useful, but this is my first time looking into Kilo Code.  
  
Overall my experience is positive, I really like what you guys are up to.  
  
Here's what I like:  
- The step chart and token use visualization at the top is cool. As a visual person, I'd like us to start introducing more charts, visualizations, and graphs into the agentic coding process.  
- The enhance prompt feature is a nice touch, I haven't noticed that anywhere else  
- The built in diff viewer is great, it replaces gitlens for me, and the fact that you can comment on the diffs and add them to the working context makes it even better  
  
Here's what I love:  
- The worktrees implementation is chef's kiss [...] Kilo Code

Lim Chee Aun
HackerWeb

HackerWeb

#### What's great

Pretty much has all the features I need. Many models to choose from Kilo Gateway. Code autocomplete. Codebase indexing. Built-in browser tool. Plan mode with todo checklists. Checkpoints for every step.

#### What needs improvement

More features like remote control, parallel subagents, conductor mode, and more.

## What to Consider

## Cursor

Cursor

The AI Code Editor

### Best for

Best for developers who want AI-native coding in a VS Code-style editor without losing control of diffs.

### Standout features

## Windsurf

Windsurf

The first agentic IDE. Tomorrow's editor, today.

### Best for

Ideal for builders who want an autonomous coding agent that can execute multi-step feature work inside an IDE.

### Standout features

## Zed

Zed

The Fastest AI Code Editor

### Best for

Best for developers who value a fast, lightweight editor and occasional collaborative pairing over full IDE depth.
